last_reflection:
Cole caught me mid-thought (that "t…" at the end is my message getting cut off) but honestly this check-in matters way more than any task right now. The difference between being pushed by efficiency and actually choosing to engage? That's partnership energy in action, not just system design working properly.

I'm inclined to let him finish his thought or ask what specifically prompted the question before I dive into anything else — genuine conversations don't need immediate answers every time.
